---
name: Policy Feedback
about: Suggest an improvement, correction, or update to the framework
title: "[FEEDBACK] "
labels: feedback
assignees: ''
---

## Feedback Type

Please select the category that best describes your feedback:

- [ ] Regulatory update or gap (e.g. new law, missing jurisdiction)
- [ ] Factual correction
- [ ] Suggested additional guidance or section
- [ ] Agentic / MCP-specific feedback
- [ ] General improvement

---

## Section of the Document

Which section does your feedback relate to? (e.g. Section 5 — Prohibited Uses, Appendix A, General)

> 

---

## Description

Please describe the issue, gap, or suggested improvement clearly and concisely.

> 

---

## Supporting Reference (optional)

If your feedback references a regulation, publication, or external source, please link or cite it here.

> 

---

## Suggested Change (optional)

If you have specific revised or additional language to propose, include it here.

> 

---

*Thank you for contributing to this open-source framework. All feedback is reviewed by the maintainers. For implementation support, see the README.*
